constraints.cardio: Optional 5-min warm-up only; no added conditioning blocks

progression.rule: If last set is clean and <=RPE7, add 2.5–5% or +1 rep next week. If >=RPE9 or pain, reduce 5–10%.

intensification_techniques.drop_set: Reduce load ~30% immediately after last working set and continue reps.
intensification_techniques.rest_pause: After last working set, rest 10–15s then continue reps to failure.

warmup_template.ramp_sets: 2–4 ramp sets for first lift of the session

exercises.name: cable lat pulldown
exercises.note: Wide grip. Last working set: reduce 30%, do 8 more reps (drop set). Full hang each rep. Rest 60–90s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: cable seated row
exercises.note: Last working set: rest 10–15s, continue to failure (rest-pause). No torso swing; row to hip. Rest 60–90s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: barbell reverse grip bent over row
exercises.note: Supinated grip; bar to lower sternum; controlled eccentric. Rest 60–90s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: dumbbell one arm row
exercises.note: 2 working sets of 8, then 1 set slightly lighter for 10 reps. Row to hip; 1s pause at top. Rest 60–90s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: cable lat pulldown
exercises.note: Neutral/close grip; seated; elbows to ribs; pause 1s at bottom. Rest 60–90s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: cable biceps bar
exercises.note: Straight bar. Last working set: rest 10–15s, continue to failure (rest-pause). No sway; full ROM. Rest 60–90s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: dumbbell hammer curl
exercises.note: Last set: 10 bilateral, then immediately 10 alternating sides without rest. Rest 60–90s. Cadence 2:2.

sessions.scheduling_note: AM only — futsal PM. Upper body only; no leg fatigue.

exercises.name: dumbbell incline fly
exercises.note: 30° incline. Wide arc; full stretch at bottom; squeeze at top. Rest 90–120s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: dumbbell incline bench press
exercises.note: Last working set: rest 10–15s, continue to failure (rest-pause). Shoulders down and back. Rest 90–120s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: dumbbell bench press
exercises.note: Each working set: 3 reps, hold 3s at bottom stretch, 3 reps, hold 3s, 3 reps. Substitutes articulated machine chest press. Rest 90–120s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: cable crossover
exercises.note: Low pulley to mid-chest. Last working set: reduce 30%, do 8 more reps immediately (drop set). Rest 90–120s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: cable rope tricep pushdown
exercises.note: Both working sets: reduce 30% after the 8, do 8 more reps immediately (drop set each). Elbows pinned; full lockout. Rest 60–90s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: cable crunch
exercises.note: Kneel; elbows to knees; fully round spine on way down. Rest 60–90s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: plank
exercises.note: Hollow body; glutes tight; no sagging hips. Rest 60s.

sessions.scheduling_note: AM only — futsal PM. Upper body only; no leg fatigue.

exercises.name: cable lat pulldown
exercises.note: Neutral/close grip. Last working set: reduce 30%, do 8 more reps (drop set). Chest up; elbows to ribs. Rest 60–90s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: cable seated row
exercises.note: Neutral grip. Last working set: rest 10–15s, continue to failure (rest-pause). No torso swing. Rest 60–90s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: barbell bent over row
exercises.note: Overhand (pronated) grip; bar to lower sternum; controlled eccentric. Rest 60–90s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: dumbbell lateral raise
exercises.note: Seated; strict; no swing; lead with elbow. Rest 60–90s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: dumbbell shoulder press
exercises.note: Standing. Substitutes Smith machine OHP. Glutes tight; no excessive arch. Rest 60–90s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: dumbbell arnold press
exercises.note: Last working set: reduce 30%, do 10 more reps (drop set). Full rotation on way up. Rest 60–90s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: dumbbell incline lateral raise
exercises.note: Lean on incline bench (~60°) for support; isolate middle delt; no body lean. Rest 60–90s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: dumbbell front raise
exercises.note: Alternating; controlled; no body swing; thumb up; stop at shoulder height. Rest 60–90s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: cable triceps pushdown
exercises.note: Straight bar. Progressive load. Elbows pinned; full lockout; slow eccentric. Rest 90–120s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: cable biceps bar
exercises.note: Straight bar. Last 2 working sets: rest 10–15s, continue to failure (rest-pause). No sway. Rest 90–120s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: cable rope overhead tricep extension
exercises.note: Last working set: reduce 30%, do 8 more reps (drop set). Full overhead stretch at top. Rest 90–120s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: dumbbell preacher curl
exercises.note: Performed on incline bench if no preacher bench. Last set: reduce 30%, continue reps (drop set). Full ROM; elbow stays fixed. Rest 90–120s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: dip
exercises.note: Add ankle weight if bodyweight is easy. Substitute with close-grip barbell bench press if no parallel bars. Rest 90–120s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: dumbbell concentration curl
exercises.note: 10 reps each arm. Elbow braced on inner thigh; peak contraction; full ROM. Rest 90–120s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: cable crunch
exercises.note: Kneel; round spine fully. Rest 60s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: plank
exercises.note: Hollow body; glutes tight. Rest 60s.

sessions.scheduling_note: Main legs day — no fatigue constraints. Goal: strength base + explosive power for sprinting, cutting, and deceleration. Begin with dynamic stretching: anterior + posterior thigh + hip flexors.

exercises.name: seated leg curl
exercises.note: Open with joint prep. Every 2 reps: hold 2s at peak contraction. Eccentric-biased: 3s controlled lowering. Rest 60s. Cadence 2:2:2.

exercises.name: leg extension
exercises.note: First 2 working sets: 12 reps. Last set: 8 reps, rest 10–15s, continue to failure (rest-pause). No knee pain chasing. Rest 60s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: barbell squat
exercises.note: Last working set: rest 10–15s, continue to failure (rest-pause). Brace hard; explosive concentric drive. Rest 90–120s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: leg press
exercises.note: Explosive concentric; controlled eccentric. Knees track toes. Rest 2 min. Cadence 2:1.

exercises.name: romanian deadlift
exercises.note: Progressive load each set. Bar close; hamstring stretch; soft knees. Key for sprint deceleration. Rest 60–90s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: barbell hip thrust
exercises.note: Explosive hip drive; 1s pause at full extension. Primary sprint power builder. Rest 2 min. Cadence 1:1.

exercises.name: lying leg curl
exercises.note: Hips stay down; smooth reps; full ROM. Complements seated curl. Rest 60s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: hip adduction
exercises.note: 2s peak contraction every rep. Groin resilience for lateral cuts and direction changes. Rest 90–120s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: calf press on leg press
exercises.note: Do 10 reps, reduce 30% immediately, do 10 more (drop set each set). Full ROM; 1s stretch at bottom. Rest 60s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: standing calf raises
exercises.note: 10 reps toes neutral/slightly out, then 10 reps toes slightly in — hits all calf heads. Rest 60s. Cadence 2:2.

exercises.name: band lateral walk
exercises.note: 15 steps each side. Band above knees; hips level; controlled steps. Glute med activation — directly transfers to lateral cutting stability. Rest 45–60s.

exercises.name: tibialis raise
exercises.note: Heel anchored; lift toes against band resistance. Ankle/shin balance for sprint volume and lateral cuts. Rest 45s.

exercises.name: ab roller
exercises.note: Posterior pelvic tilt throughout; no lumbar extension. Rest 60–90s.
